reason: A persistent risk-off mood is driving Bitcoin lower, with institutional investors actively hedging against a breach of the critical $60,000 support level. Signals from a major payments firm (Block) scaling back operations indicate potential headwinds in broader crypto adoption. While some major altcoins are retaining weekly gains, the immediate outlook for Bitcoin remains cautious due to significant downside protection being sought and a general market de-risking trend. Monitoring further price action around key support levels is advised.
headlines: Bitcoin ETF holders and treasury firms stack protection against price crash below $60,000, Deribit says
Polymarket bettors appear to have insider-traded on a market designed to catch insider traders
Bitcoin slides Friday as risk-off mood persists, but majors hold weekly gains
Analysis: Block’s retreat to 2019 scale could be a hint of deeper shifts in payments economics
World Liberty Financial ties voting power to staking as USD1 supply tops $4.7 Billion
